summary: Iteration 49: Approval Center Overhaul - All features tested and working. BUG FIX VERIFIED: Sale approval from Approval Center no longer returns 'User not found' error.

success_rate.backend: 100% (9 passed, 1 skipped - no pending PAs to test)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 tested Approval Center overhaul. All features working: (1) Client Pipeline view with expandable cards showing PA→Sale→CM→Docs stages, (2) Sale approval from Approval Center works without 'User not found' error (BUG FIXED), (3) CM assignment dropdown in approval dialog and pipeline view, (4) Document preview, (5) Sidebar cleaned up - removed duplicate tabs.

bug_fix_sale_approval.details: Sale approval from Approval Center no longer returns 'User not found' error. Direct DB operations in admin_superpowers.py fixed the issue. Tested via both API (pytest) and UI (Playwright).
bug_fix_sale_approval.evidence: Toast message 'Approved successfully' shown after clicking Confirm Approve

client_pipeline_view.details: GET /api/admin-super/approval-center/client-pipeline returns clients array with case_managers. UI shows 'Client Pipeline' and 'All Items' toggle. Pipeline shows client-wise cards with stages (PA/Sale/CM/Docs).

approve_reject_pa.details: No pending pre-assessments in 'under_review' or 'documents_submitted' stage to test. API endpoint verified to exist.

approve_reject_sale.details: Expand client with Sale Pending stage > Approve/Reject buttons visible. Clicking Approve opens dialog with optional CM assignment. Confirm creates case successfully.

case_manager_assignment.details: POST /api/admin-super/approval-center/assign-cm works. UI shows CM dropdown for unassigned cases in pipeline view and in approval dialog.

sidebar_cleanup.details: Removed tabs not visible: Pre-Assessments, Pending Sales, Revenue Forecast, Conversion Funnel, Commission Analytics, Country & Product, Pending Assignment. New tabs visible: Approval Center, Revenue Dashboard, Refund Manager, Report Builder.

frontend_tests_summary.view_toggle: PASS - Client Pipeline / All Items toggle works
frontend_tests_summary.client_cards: PASS - 48 client cards found in pipeline view
frontend_tests_summary.approve_reject_buttons: PASS - Visible in All Items view and expanded client cards
frontend_tests_summary.cm_assignment_dropdown: PASS - Visible in approval dialog and pipeline view

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCK mode - logs to console instead of sending actual emails
